name: InsightCanvas Agent
summary: Tool-calling data analysis and visualization agent focused on turning datasets into reviewable insight artifacts.
highlights: Frames analysis output as reviewable artifacts.
Separates generated claims from verification evidence.

name: MemoryBridge MCP
summary: Local-first memory connector concept for portable AI project context with explicit storage boundaries.
highlights: Prioritizes local validation before public claims.

name: RepoLens RAG
summary: Repository analysis and retrieval workflow for grounding code questions in real files and project history.
highlights: Supports codebase orientation and review workflows.
Keeps retrieval claims tied to available evidence.

name: Bug Hunter Replay
summary: Debugging evidence project for replaying bug reports, reproduction steps, and verification traces.
highlights: Avoids claiming fixes without fresh evidence.

name: Vibe Coding Review
summary: Review workflow for AI-assisted development that checks scope, evidence, claims, and maintainability.
highlights: Checks whether implementation matches the requested scope.
Surfaces missing tests and unsupported claims.
Keeps review findings ordered by severity.

name: LoopEngineering
summary: Iterative engineering workflow concept for planning, implementation, review, and verification loops.
highlights: Organizes work into planning, execution, review, and verification loops.
Keeps progress reports tied to commands and artifacts.
Treats unresolved blockers as explicit project state.
